transcript.text:
The video was taken before the spread of the Corona19 Virus. We are fully aware of the seriousness of the situation and we are currently refraining from filming outdoors in order for it to not adversely affect further spread. We wish for a speedy recovery for those affected.
I've never had this Spicy Chicken Soup I'm curious
That's huge
How is she going to eat all of that? I'm worried
[No need to worry]
Hello everyone~
I am here at Anyang today
I was told there's a famous restaurant here
They have this special dish called Spicy Chicken Soup
It's different from what we commonly know which is the Spicy Chicken Stew
I was also recommended their roasted oilless chicken
[Hong's Nutrition Center]
They were on a lot of TV shows
What is this? So cute
[It's evident that this is a chicken restaurant]
I'm very excited to try this new dish

They also call it a hot pot
They have the stew and also the roasted chicken
Excuse me, can I make an order?
1 large order of the Spicy Chicken Soup
1 order of the roasted chicken
And also the porridge
Can you eat it all? Yes
[Repeating her order but stutters]
Do it right
She ordered all of that by herself
That's going to taste so good
I'm wide awake now
I was feeling pretty down before I came here
Now I'm super excited for the food
[Even her hair]
I need to try their side dishes first

Radish kimchi is delicious
I'm so hungry
I can tell they made this pickled radish here It's good
[Enough side dish]
[Chicken porridge is here]
Thank you
This came out first
I was hoping this would come out first
I love chicken porridge
Tasty
It's already seasoned It's delicious
It's very standard
It has ginseng and stuff
Very textbook-like
It's hot
I didn't start the mukbang yet This is just an appetizer

[Plot twist: the next dish is also an appetizer...]
[2nd appetizer]
Thank you
Crispy on the outside
This needs to be eaten right away Let's dig in before it gets cold
It's very crispy
The skin is very thin
With some salt
Dip
It's hot
The skin is the best part
Yummy
It's scorching how
This can't go wrong
The meat looks juicy
[Eat the drumstick]

[Already finished it]
It's a very traditional way to make chicken
It's hot
She's so good at eating
It takes 3 grown men to finish that dish I'm not sure how she will finish it
[The chicken is cooked in the rice cooker]
[The chicken meat looks so tender]
[Here comes the main dish]
Everything here is cooked, so you can eat whenever the veggies are cooked
I'll get you a ladle
That's a lot of food
It looks very interesting
It also has noodles
[Let's try the soup]
That's..
It's like a mixture of the spicy chicken stew and the spicy fish stew

The initial taste is like the spicy chicken stew
Delicious
I have to eat the leg first
The meat is about to fall off
[The meat comes right off]
That's so soft
Even the roasted chicken wasn't this tender
Let's try the chicken breast
The drumstick just melted in my mouth That was so tender
Final verdict
It's tender
So soft
Even the chicken breast is tender
So good
[Some chicken porridge too]
I love this part too

How is it this tender?
The meat is so tender
Was it cooked in a rice cooker?
So soft
It just melts It's almost like it's not chicken
Where did the noodles go?
Did it get stuck on the bottom?
No, please no
[Gotcha]
The only problem is that the meat is just falling apart in the pot
It's just a very delicious spicy chicken stew
I was a bit confused at first
But it gets better
We want to eat like her but we'll get fat
She gets to eat whatever she wants and stay that skinny..
That's not fair

I'll have to carefully scoop the meat out with the ladle
[Making the handle]
This is the breast How does it look like this?
Oh nevermind
It's the meat next to the wings
Let's try the other stuff too
Because the meat is so tender, it's all over the soup
So you'll get the meat even if you get the soup just like this
Bones as well
I see 2 more drumsticks This wasn't 1 chicken
Can you see the meat falling apart?
It just melts
No efforts are needed It just comes off
This calls for some rice
Wing
It doesn't even look like a wing anymore

But it's still a wing
Take this in 1 bite
Some potatoes this time
That's a lot of potatoes
Look at it It's really soft
I'll show you how it's done
Take some in the bowl
Get some soup
[Take a bite]
Now break down the other one
Ya'll already know
This is how it's done
Mix it with the soup
So good
The drumsticks are lined up for me
1 bite

I'm almost done with it already?
When did I eat everything?
Hello?
You want to wire transfer?
Why?
[Oh my]
Someone wants to pay for her meal
Your fan said he'll pay for your bill
No, don't let him
[A phone call from her fan]
[What in the world..]
It's okay
There are people watching her from outside
Look outside
[Photo time]
[Turned into a fan-meeting]

This looks delicious
I want to eat it right now
Can I?
That tastes good
I want more
Excuse me,
Can I get some fried rice?
[Speechless]
Should I do 1 more order?
How is she so good at eating?
[I was born this way]
[Finishing up the porridge first]
This is so yummy
[Time for the fried rice]
Fried rice!
This isn't a drumstick It's half a chicken

Yum
It's good
[Cleared]
Scape it like this
Delicious
So good
[About to faint]
She's so..
I have no words
I approve
Thank you
[Finishing up the rest]
Thanks everyone~
Tzuyang? Is she Chinese?
Oh the girl that eats a lot?
What is she doing with the broadcasting team?

Tzuyang's Homestay
Grocery Shopping Show
Law of the Jungle too?
She will be doing all of that?
She will come and dominate all the TV shows?
This broadcasting team is ready to show it all
Click subscribe and like
[Subtitles by Hyun Choi antharoni@gmail.com]
